'''L. Fraig''' was once a member of [[Cherit]]'s gang until [[Jaing Skirata]] killed Cherit. Working from the [[Tekshar Falls Casino]], he maintained some legitimacy in his business and gathered many contacts. When [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] came looking for Skirata, he questioned Fraig on how to contact the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] by dangling Fraig from a building. When Fett was satisfied with the answers he got, Fraig was pulled back up, only to be knocked out by Fett's granddaughter, [[Mirta Gev]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
